parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.tags, c.name AS category FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') OR LOWER(p.tags) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') OR LOWER(c.name) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') ORDER BY p.name LIMIT $2;
